workId.description: Parent work. Consumers that care about work-level publication (e.g. is this the first edition of this work to go live) infer it by checking whether other published Books already exist for this workId — there is no separate WorkPublished event.

isWorksFirstPublishedBook.description: True if this event caused the parent work to transition draft/approved -> published (see catalog.enforce_book_work_status trigger).
